text: あなたも海底を探索したかったの？

あはは！　無理しておねえさんに
話を合わせなくていいよ。

でも探索は絶対に一人より
二人でやるほうが楽しいよね。

それにわたし、あなたと組むといつも
燃えちゃう

Did you want to head down and explore the
seabed, too?

Heh, don't feel like you need to fake it just
for me, okay?

But I'll tell you, it will definitely be more
fun to head there as a team than it would be
all alone.

Especially for me, because I'm always at my
best when I'm working side-by-side with you!
